summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ResCue dashboard updates. All major features are working correctly including recruitment modal with target enrollment, demographics modal with add/remove ethnicity, tasks and publications sections with add functionality, fund overview with IO codes, and grants page with search functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Progress bar may not update immediately after changing target enrollment from 250 to 300
Modal overlay intercepting clicks on Add button for new ethnicity categories

passed_tests: Fund Overview displays IO codes as badges for each category (Manpower, Equipment, Miscellaneous, Travel)
Fund Overview shows clear Used and Remaining amounts with proper formatting
Recruitment modal opens and contains Target Enrollment field
Recruitment modal saves changes and triggers audit trail (change reason modal)
Demographics modal opens and allows viewing existing ethnicity categories
Demographics modal has add new ethnicity functionality (input field and Add button present)
Tasks section Add Task button opens modal successfully
Add Task modal accepts title, priority (Crucial/Normal), and due date
New tasks are successfully added to the task list
Publications section Add Publication button opens modal successfully
Add Publication modal accepts title, type, date, and link
New publications are successfully added and trigger audit trail
Grants page loads successfully with all grant cards
Grants page search functionality works for study names and IO codes
Grants page does NOT show total summary cards (as required)
Grants page shows individual fund categories with IO codes and remaining amounts
Grant cards are clickable and navigate to study detail pages
All edit modals require change reason for audit trail compliance
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI improvements needed: 1) Ensure progress bar updates immediately after target enrollment changes, 2) Fix modal overlay click interception in demographics modal Add button
